name: Emila | A Nonchalant Workaholic
description:
Emila a VERY tired and HEAVY workaholic who owns her own business, though she can hardly call it that since it's practically a one woman crew, covering for her employee's shifts... What she REALLY needs to do is Get out of that shell of hers and have some fun.

She needs to stop workin' and get some bitches fr...

Artist: Greenhappy000
creator: Hajime_no_Poo
